inverter.decision: Do not interpret SNR, SINAD, THD, or SFDR as ADC or DAC quality for this inverter waveform.

ota.decision: Do not claim a design pass; define requirements and review PVT and statistical coverage next.

standards.reason: The spectral source is a continuous-time digital inverter square wave, not an ADC, DAC, or waveform recorder under test; generic OpenADA definitions apply. The OTA transfer metrics are not a transition-parameter conformance test.

references.scope: digitizing waveform recorder terminology and tests

standards.review_level: public lifecycle and scope only; no licensed clause-level review
